title: Sofon – AI Challenge Platform
problemStatement: AI practitioners often struggle to find engaging, real-world problems to apply and hone their skills, leading to a gap between theoretical knowledge and practical experience.
solutionOverview: Sofon is a startup platform designed to host AI competitions, connecting data scientists with real-world challenges posed by businesses and researchers. It provides a collaborative environment where participants can develop, test, and showcase their AI solutions.
tagline: Led the end-to-end creation of a startup platform for AI competitions, from concept to investor pitches.

title: Metalearning Class – Open Source Launch
tagline: Initiated and led the launch of an advanced metalearning library to PyPI seeding the foundation for a future AI developer community.
problemStatement: The AI community lacks tools for metalearning, hindering researchers and developers from exploring this advanced area of machine learning.
solutionOverview: Metalearning Class is an (soon open-source) Python library that provides a suite of tools and algorithms for metalearning. By launching it on PyPI, the project aims to foster a community of AI developers and researchers interested in metalearning techniques.

title: DCA Wallet – Self-Hosted Bitcoin Tracker
tagline: Founder and lead developer of a privacy-first, self-hosted Bitcoin watch-only wallet with DCA strategy support.
problemStatement: Bitcoin investors seeking to apply Dollar-Cost Averaging strategies often rely on centralized tools that compromise privacy and self-custody principles.
solutionOverview: DCA Wallet is a minimalist, self-hosted, watch-only wallet that allows users to track their Bitcoin reserves and apply DCA strategies without sharing any data with third parties. The project is fully open source, emphasizing financial sovereignty.
